evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 32811760. 2021/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: To explore the research trends for uveal melanoma with bibliometric 
methods using Web of Science Core Collection (WoSCC) and PubMed (PM).
METHODS: T
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 32811760. 2021/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: To explore the research trends for uveal melanoma with bibliometric 
methods using Web of Science Core Collection (WoSCC) and PubMed (PM).
METHODS: To find UM-related studies, "uveal melanoma" was used as search term in 
the WoSCC and PM for the period time from 2000 to 2020. Bibliographic coupling 
analysis was used to investigate the journals with the highest number of 
UM-related publications. VOSviewer (VV) was used for mapping the knowledge
evidence.search_query: top brachytherapy centers United States annual case volume ranking
